judgment.summary: Dominant growth company with exceptional profitability and strong analyst backing, trading at a premium but justified by rapid expansion.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus EPS by 5.5%; next earnings date is 2026-05-20.
positives: Revenue growth 73.2% YoY and Earnings growth 95.6% YoY demonstrate massive expansion.
Operating margin 65.0% and Profit margin 55.6% are industry-leading.
Return on equity 101.5% and Return on assets 51.2% show outstanding capital efficiency.
Free cash flow $58.13B TTM indicates robust cash generation.
Consensus rating is strong buy with a mean target of $275.83.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 7.25 is high, though offset by substantial cash reserves.
Forward P/E of 19.19 and Price/Sales of 25.07 indicate a premium valuation.
Beta of 2.24 suggests higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: TD Cowen reiterated a bullish stance on NVIDIA Corporation, signaling continued confidence in the company's prospects. While the analyst rating provides a positive backdrop, traders should note that NVIDIA's next earnings report is scheduled for today, May 20th. This imminent catalyst could introduce significant volatility, regardless of the outcome.

headlines.title: TD Cowen Remains Bullish on NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA)
